title: Interpretation Record
description: Structured output for a two-pass image interpretation. Pass 1 is literal description; pass 2 is reflective interpretation. All inference must be explicitly marked and separated from description.

image_id.description: Stable identifier for the image being interpreted

source.description: URI of the image or archive entry

literal_description.description: Pass 1: Observable forms, spatial relations, colors, text, and structure. No inference. Must be verifiable against the image surface.

visual_relations.description: Spatial and compositional relations between visible elements (e.g. 'figure positioned below light source', 'text runs along lower margin')

contexts.description: Where and how this form recurs

recurrence_evidence.description: What archive or image evidence supports candidacy

confidence.description: Confidence that symbolic function is active in this instance

observer_type.description: The kind of witness producing this interpretation

archive.description: Archive or dataset this image is drawn from

archive_limitations.description: Known biases or gaps in the archive

agent_model.description: If machine, the model producing this record

context_available.description: What contextual information was available at interpretation time

archive_links.description: Related archive entries, comparison images, or concept file IDs

interpretive_claims.description: Pass 2: Reflective inferences. Each claim must state its basis explicitly.

basis.description: What visual or archival evidence supports this claim

scope.description: How broadly this claim applies (this image, this series, this tradition)

rejected_claims.description: Inferences considered and explicitly rejected, with reasons

reason.description: Why this claim was rejected (prohibited inference, insufficient evidence, archive bias)

overall_level.description: Overall interpretive uncertainty for this record

requires_human_witness.description: Whether human review is recommended before acting on this interpretation

safety_notes.description: Constraints and cautions specific to this record
